results.title: Google VP of global infrastructure says that while people's 'fears' related to data centers are legitimate, there is also a lack of information about ...
results.description: Google acknowledges legitimate concerns about AI data center water use, attributing distrust to a lack of information. The company unveiled new industry guidelines aiming to address these worries by promoting water replenishment, avoiding water-intensive cooling in stressed areas, and increasing transparency in water consumption.

results.title: SpaceX to raise at least $75 billion in IPO
results.description: SpaceX plans to raise at least $75 billion in its initial public offering, valuing the company at more than $1.75 trillion. The post SpaceX to raise at least $75 billion in IPO appeared first on SpaceNews .
